title: Duke dodges scare, tips cap to McNamara, Siena
content: Duke barely avoided a shocking upset to open the NCAA tournament, with the No. 1 overall seed having to rally from 13 points down and going ahead for good in the final 5 minutes to beat 16th-seeded Siena 71-65 on Thursday.

title: Sources: NFL to vote on Raiders succession plan
content: NFL owners are scheduled to vote on a Raiders succession plan that gives Silver Lake co-chief executive officer Egon Durban the option to purchase a majority stake in the team from longtime owner Mark Davis, sources told ESPN.

title: Johnston, High Point stun 5th-seeded Badgers
content: Chase Johnston made his first 2-point basket of the season to give No. 12 seed High Point an 83-82 victory over fifth-seeded Wisconsin on Thursday in the first round of the NCAA tournament.

title: TCU backs up its tough talk, bounces Buckeyes
content: Xavier Edmonds converted a layup to beat the shot clock with 4.3 seconds left, and No. 9 seed TCU held off a furious second-half rally by eighth-seeded Ohio State for a 66-64 victory to open the first round of the NCAA tournament.

title: Leafs' Matthews (MCL surgery) down 12 weeks
content: Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews underwent successful MCL surgery Thursday, with an expected recovery time of 12 weeks, the team announced.

title: Profar gets full PED ban after appeal resolved
content: Braves outfielder Jurickson Profar will miss the entire 2026 season after his appeal of a positive test for performance-enhancing drugs was resolved.

title: 'Storybook ending': Nebraska ends NCAA drought
content: No. 4 seed Nebraska captured its first-ever NCAA tournament win in a 76-47 drubbing of No. 13 seed Troy in the first round Thursday.

title: UK's Pope offers little on Lendeborg's money talk
content: Kentucky men's basketball coach Mark Pope had a lot of things to say about Yaxel Lendeborg's comments that he received a multimillion dollar offer to play for the Wildcats -- except for saying the Michigan star was wrong.

title: 🏀 Best bets for men's tournament first round
content: As you prepare for tipoff, here are our best bets for the first round, plus picks for the new Eliminator game.

content: When was LeBron James' peak? There's an argument to be made for 2013, when his Miami Heat did not lose for 52 straight days.

content: The clubs face off Thursday -- and maybe again in mid-April. Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

content: The 2026 World Baseball Classic was another success story. But issues with pitcher usage are still holding it back.

content: The designated hitter struggled early in his career -- but he's now a powerhouse hitter and crucial vocal leader in a young A's clubhouse.

content: How will top prospects come off the board in Round 1? Mel Kiper Jr. projects the draft's first 32 picks.

title: Weekend predictions: Arsenal or Man City to win Carabao final? Who takes Madrid derby?
content: From a cup final in England to a Madrid derby and relegation six-pointer, another wild weekend of action awaits as Julien Laurens picks out the best games to watch in Europe.

content: We have four incredible quarterfinals, including Barcelona-Atlético. Bill Connelly previews and predicts the action.

title: Is USMNT striker group the best it's ever had for a World Cup?
content: For the past 20 years, the USMNT has never truly had one striker it could reliably depend on. Now, ahead of this summer's World Cup, it has four.

title: 2026 NCAA wrestling championships: Schedule, how to watch
content: It's time for the 2026 NCAA wrestling championships! This year crowned the first women's tournament champion. Check out how to watch now.

content: Will Aaron Rodgers check the QB box for the Steelers? Can the Seahawks find running back help? And is there something the Chiefs can do at cornerback?

title: Biggest questions, projections and more: Storylines to watch ahead of NBA playoffs
content: Our NBA insiders answer the biggest questions facing contenders in the East and West as the regular season winds to a close.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United make move for Newcastle's Guimarães
content: Manchester United have reportedly made a move for Bruno Guimarães, while Europe's biggest clubs keep an eye on Bournemouth's Rayan. Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: What do the first two rounds of a perfect draft look like?
content: Tristan H. Cockcroft and Eric Karabell reveal the ideal outcome for the first two rounds of a 10-team draft from any starting draft position.

title: Eight standout fights on the PFL slate over the next five weeks
content: Champion Costello van Steenis, fan-favorite Paul Hughes and familiar names Bryan Battle, Sergio Pettis and more litter the PFL's upcoming schedule.

title: 16 US Military Aircraft Destroyed Since Start Of Iran War
content: Five other KC-135s were reportedly damaged by an Iranian missile strike while parked at an airfield in Saudi Arabia.

title: War With Iran Could End "Faster Than People Think": Netanyahu
content: Israeli President Benjamin Netanyahu said on Thursday that he believed the war in Iran could finish sooner than "people think".

title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Stop Attacks On Iranian Gas Field
content: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu said that at the request of President Trump, Israel will hold off on any further attacks on the Iranian gas field.

title: Netanyahu Says Iran No Longer Has Uranium Enrichment Capacity
content: Benjamin Netanyahu said that Iran's missile and drone arsenal is being massively degraded and will be destroyed.

title: Can US Send Convoys To Protect Ships In Hormuz? What Naval Warfare Laws Say
content: Even though the Strait of Hormuz is subject to the sovereignty of adjacent states, all other states' ships have navigational rights through the strait.

title: Iran War LIVE: Israel Did Not Drag US Into War With Iran, Trump Makes Own Calls: Netanyahu
content: US Israel Iran War News LIVE Updates: Iran has been striking its Persian Gulf neighbours' energy facilities since the war started on February 28, and has made the Strait of Hormuz shipping channel, nearly impassable.

title: US Approves Over $16 Billion In Arms Sales To Gulf Nations Hit By Iran War
content: The biggest single sale is of lower-tier air and missile defense sensor radars, which are designed to track high-speed targets and give data to a missile defense network, to Kuwait for $8 billion.

title: Hegseth Warns Of "Largest Strike Package" Against Iran, Says US Is Winning
content: "Epic Fury is different. It's laser-focused. It's decisive. Our objectives, given directly from our America First President, remain exactly as they were on Day One...We're winning -- decisively and on our terms," Hegseth said.

title: Trump Says Told Netanyahu Not To Attack Iran Gas Fields
content: Trump insisted on social media overnight that he "knew nothing" about Wednesday's strike by Israel on the South Pars gas field in Iran, which retaliated to the attack by hitting Qatari energy sites.

title: UAE Welcomes Maritime Body Condemning Iran's Attacks, Closure Of Hormuz
content: In a statement following the IMO Council's emergency session in London, the UAE backed the decision to strongly condemn Iranian threats and attacks on commercial vessels, as well as what it described as Tehran's attempted closure of the Strait of Hor

title: Ships, Flights, Fuel: How Iran-Israel War Is Keeping Global Economy On Edge
content: Oil, gas and transport costs have surged noticeably amid the ongoing West Asia war that began on February 28 and continues to unfold.

title: Ground Report: Bhabanipur Weighs 'Bengal's Daughter' Versus Calls For Change
content: Often denoted as the "mini-India" of Kolkata, an amalgamation of Bengali and non-Bengali voters forms this Bhabanipur segment.

title: On Camera, Car Rams Bike In Gujarat's Vadodara, Biker Falls 10 Feet Away
content: Utilising viral mobile videos and CCTV footage from the shops, the police successfully tracked the vehicle and arrested the driver within hours.

title: Congress, Raijor Dal Finalise Assam Polls Alliance After Several Deadlocks
content: An MoU formalising the alliance between the two parties was signed on Thursday, marking a significant political development ahead of the 2026 Assembly polls.

title: "Crossed All Boundaries": Mamata Banerjee To Poll Body On Officials' Transfer
content: In a strongly worded letter, her eighth to the CEC, Mamata Banerjee alleged that it had "crossed all boundaries of decency and constitutional propriety".

title: New York-Mumbai Air India Flight Diverted To Saudi Arabia After Fire Indication
content: A Mumbai-bound Air India aircraft was diverted to Medina, Saudi Arabia, on Thursday afternoon following an aft cargo fire indication in the cockpit that turned out to be false.

title: US' TikTok-Style Iran War Clips Spark Backlash For Trivialising Conflict
content: Across its social media platforms, the administration has pushed out high-energy clips that cut between actual explosions in Iran and footage of action heroes, gaming sequences, and even hard-hitting football moments.

title: Nearly Week After Probe, 1 Arrested In Tamil Nadu Minor's Murder Case
content: After nearly a week of investigation with analysing CCTV and the Tower Dump method, Dharma Muneshwaran has been arrested by Tamil Nadu Police in connection with the sexual assault and murder of a 17-year-old girl in Thoothukudi.

title: Iran Attack On Complex Will Hit LNG Exports For 3-5 Years: QatarEnergy CEO
content: The energy industry has for years feared a conflict in the region would cause long-term damage to oil and gas facilities and trigger shortages in global energy supplies.

title: International Cyber Syndicate Busted In Srinagar, 7 Arrested
content: Police said the raids were conducted after Counter Intelligence Kashmir (CIK) received information regarding the functioning of call centres engaged in fraudulent online activities targeting both foreign nationals and locals.

title: Russia, the quiet winner? How Middle East war may be boosting Putin’s war chest
content: As Middle East tensions escalate, Russia is quietly positioning itself to benefit from the ensuing chaos. While global powers focus on the conflict, Moscow is leveraging diplomacy and energy markets to expand its influence. The crisis has boosted Russia's energy revenues and shifted international attention away from Ukraine, creating a strategic advantage for Moscow.

title: Years after Zuckerberg called it 'the next frontier’ for company, Meta shuts down Horizon worlds
content: Meta is shutting down its virtual reality social network, Horizon Worlds, for Quest headsets by June 15, 2026. The platform will transition to a mobile-only experience, aiming for greater focus and growth. This move follows significant investment and struggles to attract users, with the Reality Labs division reporting substantial losses.

title: Big oil relief soon? What Trump’s possible ‘unsanctioning’ of Iran crude means for India
content: India has not been buying crude oil from Iran since mid-2019 after the US ended waiver for sanctions on Iran crude. Around 35-40% of India’s crude oil needs are met through cargoes that make their way towards Asia through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Three weeks, three challenges: Inside India’s battles as Middle East explodes
content: Operation Epic Fury has plunged the Middle East into chaos, prompting India to manage a multi-faceted crisis. Over 2.2 lakh Indians have returned home amidst escalating conflict, while energy supplies face strain. New Delhi navigates a delicate diplomatic tightrope, balancing global powers to protect its citizens and economic interests.

title: Amazon on 'failed' USPS deal: We negotiated with them in good faith for more than a year
content: Amazon clarified its relationship with USPS, stating negotiations for a renewed agreement were abruptly ended by the postal service in December after over a year of good-faith discussions. Despite submitting a bid under USPS's new auction model, Amazon awaits a response and warns of needing to invest in alternative delivery options due to planning uncertainty.

title: Perplexity AI CEO: Google search does a much better job than anyone else in the world
content: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas, who once offered $34.5 billion for Google Chrome, now defaults Google search on his company's Comet iOS browser. He acknowledges Google's superiority for everyday navigational queries, while Comet aims to enhance answer quality and multimodal capabilities. This pragmatic approach positions Comet as a complementary tool, not a direct competitor, to Google.

title: Boogie2988 controversy explained: Viral livestream clash with disabled stream guest
content: YouTuber Boogie2988 faces backlash after a viral clip shows him threatening a disabled guest, Turbo, during a live stream. The incident occurred after Turbo teased Boogie during a basketball game. While some viewers defended Boogie, citing Turbo's aggressive behavior, many condemned his remarks, highlighting the need for respect, especially towards individuals with disabilities. The situation sparks debate on streamer conduct.

title: Cavaliers vs Bulls injury report: Latest updates, stats, H2H
content: The Cleveland Cavaliers prepare to play the Chicago Bulls.  Jarrett Allen is out for Cleveland, impacting their defense and rebounding. Chicago also has multiple players unavailable.  However, Collin Sexton is expected to play for the Bulls.  This game could be high-scoring, similar to their previous matchups this season.  Both teams are managing injuries as they compete.

title: Dhruv Rathee slams Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge, calls it blatant propaganda
content: Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has opened to packed theatres and strong footfall. While many viewers have praised the film’s scale, performances, and storytelling, a section of the audience feels it doesn’t match up to the first installment. Amid the buzz, YouTuber Dhruv Rathee has once again stirred controversy, this time targeting Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge and its director Aditya Dhar.

title: Iran to play FIFA World Cup but 'boycott' US amid Trump's 'safety' warning
content: "We will be preparing for the World Cup. We will boycott the United States but not the World Cup," Taj said in a video released by the Iranian press agency Fars News Agency on Wednesday, as cited by news agency AFP.

title: Manish Malhotra’s mother Garima Malhotra passes away
content: Ace fashion designer Manish Malhotra’s mother, Garima Malhotra, passed away on Thursday. Bollywood celebrities including Aishwarya Rai Bachchan and Abhishek Bachchan, Kiara Advani and Sidharth Malhotra, Karan Johar, Karisma Kapoor, Raveena Tandon, Alvira Khan, Shah Rukh Khan's manager Pooja Dadlani were among those seen paying their last respects.

title: Horoscope today: Astrological predictions for March 20
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for March 20, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Bail for three Jaish OGWs with GPS anklets
content: Jammu and Kashmir Police have placed GPS anklets on three individuals accused of aiding Jaish-e-Mohammad terrorists. These overground workers were released on interim bail after a court order. The anklets will monitor their movements continuously. This measure follows their arrest in connection with a 2024 attack on an army convoy in Kathua.

title: European powers, Japan back Hormuz security effort; condemn Iran’s attacks on shipping
content: Six major powers, including Britain and France, have pledged support for safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, condemning Iran's recent attacks on commercial vessels and energy infrastructure.  While ready to contribute to maritime security, immediate naval deployment is not planned due to high threat levels.  They also back emergency oil releases to stabilize global energy markets.

title: Dubai to host Eid prayers in over 900 mosques, confirms timing in UAE emirate
content: Dubai is set for a massive Eid ul Fitr prayer gathering across over 900 mosques, a shift from traditional open-ground prayers. This move prioritises safety and order amid regional security concerns. The coordinated 6:40 am prayer time aims to ensure a unified spiritual experience, reflecting a broader Gulf-wide trend towards structured, secure celebrations.

title: Eid-ul-Fitr: Wishes, messages, quotes, and images for sharing
content: Eid-ul-Fitr has arrived, marking the end of Ramadan with joyous celebrations.  This guide offers a collection of heartfelt, fun, and spiritual messages to share with loved ones via WhatsApp and social media.

title: Big blow for Rajasthan Royals: Star England cricketer to miss IPL 2026
content: According to a report by ESPNCricinfo, Curran, who joined Rajasthan Royals (RR) from Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in a trade that also involved Ravindra Jadeja moving the other way and Sanju Samson heading to CSK, is in doubt for the entire season.

title: US F-35 struck by Iranian fire? Jet makes emergency landing; IRGC releases video
content: A US F-35 fighter jet made an emergency landing after being struck by Iranian fire during a combat mission over Iran. The stealth jet landed safely at a US air base in the Middle East, with the pilot reported to be in stable condition. This incident is currently under investigation.

title: 'Strength behind my Man's success': Sakshi pens post for Dhoni's father
content: MS Dhoni's wife Sakshi Dhoni shared a heartfelt post for Pan Singh Dhoni, calling him the "strength behind my Man's success." She praised his inspiring journey and role in shaping MS Dhoni. Meanwhile, AB de Villiers suggested Dhoni should bat higher for Chennai Super Kings or consider a mentoring role.

title: Lockie Ferguson to miss IPL 2026 start, puts family first: 'Help my wife out'
content: Lockie Ferguson will miss the early IPL 2026 matches for Punjab Kings to spend time with his newborn. He plans to join later. Despite managing workload, he said, "I'm still very committed to play for New Zealand," and aims to feature in upcoming World Cups while supporting a future franchise league at home.

title: Iga Swiatek faces tough Miami Open build up after Indian Wells loss
content: Iga Swiatek is facing a difficult build-up to the Miami Open after her Indian Wells loss. She spoke about tough weather, limited practice time, and adjustment issues in Miami. The Polish star also dropped to world No. 3 after Elena Rybakina moved ahead. With no titles in 2026 so far, Swiatek now looks to bounce back quickly.

title: More pain loading? How Iran's strikes on LNG, oil hubs across Gulf impact India
content: India gets around 40% of its LNG requirements from Qatar. Reacting to the damage to key energy infrastructure in the Middle East, External Affairs Ministry spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said, “India had previously called for the avoidance of targeting civilian infrastructure, including energy infrastructure, across the region.”

title: 'Not 20 anymore': Abhishek Sharma told to take more responsibility in IPL
content: The 25-year-old Abhishek has built a reputation for fast starts at the top of the order with his high-risk approach. However, his starts have not always turned into big scores.

title: US may unsanction Iranian oil to cool prices as Gulf war shakes energy markets
content: The Trump administration is considering releasing 140 million barrels of Iranian oil to stabilize global prices amid escalating Gulf conflict. US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent indicated a potential move within days to boost physical supply, describing it as a "break the glass plan.

title: Armageddon scenario! Why Iran's attack on Qatar's LNG hub spells nightmare for Europe, Asia
content: Under normal conditions, roughly one-fifth of the world’s LNG supply originates from Ras Laffan, which is a sprawling industrial hub developed over three decades at a cost of hundreds of billions of dollars and covering an area nearly three times that of Paris.

title: Trump-Netanyahu split out in open? Intel chief says Israel's goals in Iran not same as US
content: US intelligence chief Tulsi Gabbard revealed differing objectives between the US and Israel in their campaign against Iran. While President Trump aims to destroy Iran's missile capabilities and navy, Israel focuses on disabling its leadership.

title: Nashik astrologer 'Captain' arrested for raping, blackmailing woman for 3 years
content: A 67-year-old astrologer, known as 'captain', was arrested in Nashik for allegedly raping a 28-year-old woman between 2022 and 2025. The woman's complaint details manipulation and threats, leading to her filing a case under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita and the Maharashtra Prevention of Human Sacrifice Act. Authorities are investigating potential superstitious practices alongside the sexual exploitation charges.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Fitr: 50 heartfelt wishes, messages, and quotes for your loved ones
content: Eid-ul-Fitr, the joyous festival marking the end of Ramadan, is a time for gratitude, generosity, and togetherness. Families gather, homes are decorated, and delicious feasts are prepared. This occasion offers a perfect opportunity to express love and good wishes.

title: 'I measure people by results,' says LSG owner; fans ask ‘Rahul ke liye ya Pant?'
content: The post did not mention any individual, but several users linked it to former LSG captain KL Rahul, who is no longer part of the franchise setup, while some linked it to current LSG captain Rishabh Pant.

title: India to buy LPG from Russia? MEA says will ensure 'people's fuel needs are met'
content: India is actively seeking LPG from all available sources, including Russia, to secure energy supplies. This move comes as the Middle East conflict disrupts global energy markets. India is also continuing to provide energy assistance to neighboring nations like Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, and Maldives. Consumers are urged to use LPG wisely.

title: Pakistan's Shehzad compares IPL with PSL, calls it retired cricketers’ league
content: Ahmed Shehzad criticised the Pakistan Cricket Board after poor results, comparing the Pakistan Super League unfavourably with the Indian Premier League. He said PSL lacks quality and relies on a few backed players. Shehzad blamed both players and management, calling PCB weak and accusing players of avoiding responsibility during Pakistan’s ongoing slump.

title: Govt launches Rs 497cr RELIEF scheme to support exporters hit by Middle East conflict
content: India has launched the Rs 497 crore RELIEF scheme to aid exporters facing Middle East conflict disruptions. The initiative, managed by ECGC, offers extended export obligations, enhanced insurance cover, and crucial support for MSMEs grappling with increased freight and insurance costs. This aims to maintain India's market share and prevent shipment delays.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Malampuzha poised for LDF-BJP rematch, UDF takes desperate gamble
content: Though the Bharatiya Janata Party has been making visible inroads in this left bastion, the Left Democratic Front continues to dominate in most panchayats. The constituency is seeing a rematch between LDF’s A. Prabhakaran and BJP’s C. Krishnakumar. UDF has fielded A. Suresh, a former personal assistant to V.S. Achuthanandan

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: The Left grapples with shifting loyalties
content: Ahead of the 2026 Assembly polls, six former legislators, four from the CPI(M) and two from the CPI, severed their communist ties and are now gearing up to contest from the rival camps or as Independents. The happenings, rather uncommon in Kerala, have garnered much attention.

title: Rift widens among Bihar Opposition after Rajya Sabha poll defeat
content: The ruling NDA leaders now have dared Opposition RJD to expel its legislator from the party while, coalition Communist Party of India-Marxist-Leninist (Liberation) has accused Congress of making their vote go to ‘waste’

title: Supreme Court dismisses plea seeking enquiry into CITES violation by Jamnagar-based animal rescue centre and trust
content: The petition had sought a judicial direction to the Union government, Central Zoo Authority, Directorate General of Foreign Trade and the Wildlife Crime Control Bureau to produce the entire record of the permissions, recognitions and import/export licences granted to the rescue and rehabilitation centre and the welfare trust since 2019

title: Delhi court acquits two booked under UAPA after they spent eight years in jail
content: Additional Sessions Judge Amit Bansal of the Patiala House Courts observed that the prosecution has failed to prove the charges slapped on the accused, Jamsheed Zahoor Paul and Parvaiz Rashid

title: Dravidian titans face a new disruptor as Tamil Nadu girds for a high-stakes contest
content: The principal players made compromises to strengthen alliances; M.K. Stalin, to prevent vote spillover, has given a Rajya Sabha berth to the DMDK, while Edappadi Palaniswami roped in the PMK by giving Anbumani a similar deal

title: Delhi HC issues notice on plea seeking removal of India’s patent head
content: The petition has been filed by the All India Patent Officers’ Welfare Association (AIPOWA) alleging that Mr Pandit’s appointment was “illegal and arbitrary” and made in violation of prescribed eligibility criteria

title: Facing evictions, Gulmarg hoteliers withdraw petitions ‘to settle issue with J&K Govt.’
content: Official sources said the J&K government, unlike the Lieutenant Governor administration, intended to form a committee to look into the lease issues and auctions

title: 24 States, U.T.s set aside funds for new rural jobs scheme
content: They use past expenditure under the MGNREGA as the baseline as the Centre is yet to notify the formula for determining the State-wise normative allocations under the VB-GRAM (G) Act

title: West Asia troubles to delay India’s FTA talks with GCC countries and Israel
content: The FTAs with the UK and the EU are still on track to be implemented and ratified, respectively, this year

title: Iran may let more Indian vessels pass Hormuz Strait: Lloyds List
content: The maritime data company has reported that nine ships have exited through Iran’s corridor in Strait of Hormuz; reliable sources in India, meanwhile, said that with the situation in West Asia escalating further, Indian ships stuck in the strait for more than two weeks have been asked to ‘stay put’ for now after Israeli strikes on Iran’s largest gas fields

title: Global cooperation is crucial to tackle AI bias and risks, says PM
content: While AI may enhance human capabilities, the ultimate responsibility for decision-making must remain with humans, stresses Modi; India is working to create diverse datasets that represent its plurality and accommodate regional languages, he adds

title: ‘Family first’ in BJP list of bypoll candidates in Nagaland, Tripura
content: The party’s candidate for the Koridang seat in Nagaland is the son of the deceased MLA, while his counterpart in Tripura’s Dharmanagar is the son-in-law of a former contestant

title: Thoothukudi Class XII girl murder: police arrest 38-year-old man, say he was arrested for similar offence in 2022
content: The 17-year-old girl reportedly went missing on the evening of March 10 after she went to a nearby scrub jungle area

title: Book offering behind-the-scenes glimpse of political strategy launched
content: Speaking at the launch event, Minister Palanivel Thiaga Rajan says the book distills the author’s experiences, covering a wide range of scenarios with clarity and will serve as a learning curve for anyone entering politics or campaign-related fields

title: Grand Ugadi celebrations organised in Andhra
content: In the evening, Radhotsavam was held for the processional idols of Sri Bhramaramba Mallikarjuna Swamy on the streets of the temple town

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI (M) unrelenting in demand for six seats, stalemate in talks with DMK continues
content: The DMK’s argument is that it cannot part with more seats as it has accommodated additional parties in the alliance and has already given three more seats to the Congress.

title: T.N. Assembly’s annual sitting days declined from 64 in the first term to 32 in the 16th: PRS study
content: According to an analysis by PRS Legislative Research, the 16th Assembly, whose tenure began on May 11, 2021, and is set to conclude on May 10, 2026, met for only 155 days, the lowest for a full-term Assembly since 1952

title: Received consular access plea for six Ukrainian nationals: MEA
content: Ministry of External Affairs says the Ukrainians and an American were found “wanting” of the required permits for visiting Mizoram

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Congress announces second list of 37 candidates
content: T.O. Mohanan has been fielded in the Kannur Assembly constituency, which was sought K. Sudhakaran, MP, and Satheesh Kochuparambil from the Konni constituency, which was sought by Adoor Prakash, MP

title: Crescent moon not sighted; Id to be celebrated across India, except Kerala, on March 21
content: Id will be celebrated in the country on Saturday (March 21, 2026), he said. However, the festival will be celebrated in Kerala on Friday (March 20, 2026)

title: Centre should intervene to arrange travel facilities for expats, says Kerala CM
content: Pinarayi says it is most commendable that members of Loka Kerala Sabha and expatriate organisations in the Gulf countries are coming together to provide assistance to people in distress in this time of unrest

title: Assam Assembly elections 2026: Pradyut factor in Congress’s third list of candidates
content: The Asom Gana Parishad (AGP), one of the BJP’s three regional allies, announced its first and final list of 26 candidates

title: Assembly elections 2026 highlights: R.G. Kar Medical College rape-murder victim’s mother seeks BJP ticket
content: Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee expressed alarm over the “arbitrary removal of more than 50 senior officials” in West Bengal

title: CBI questions Anil Ambani in ₹2,929-crore cheating case
content: Anil Ambani is facing investigation for alleged fund diversion, misappropriation and other irregularities in loan funds, based on a complaint by the State Bank of India

title: Unfenced border in focus amid arrest of seven foreigners who crossed to Myanmar via porous border
content: According to the latest data, of the total 1,643 km of fencing approved by the government, only 43.75 km has been completed so far; fencing project has faced resistance from residents of border States as people on either side share deep ethnic, social and cultural ties

title: Supreme privilege to touch the sacred dust of Ayodhya, says President Murmu
content: Embracing the principles of Ram Rajya, we can construct a nation grounded in morality and ethical conduct, the President says

title: ECI’s transfer of Bengal officials is political interference of the highest order, says Mamata
content: Mamata Banerjee described the move as a  ‘systematic politicisation of institutions meant to remain impartial and a direct assault on the Constitution’

title: West Bengal Assembly polls: BJP announces second list of candidates; R.G. Kar rape-murder victim’s mother seeks ticket
content: Party fields former MPs, MLAs, and lawyers but has stayed quiet on the candidature of R.G. Kar rape-murder victim’s mother

title: Modi, Jaishankar work the phones, call for dialogue as strikes on energy infrastructure escalate
content: French President says India and France working closely together to reduce tensions in West Asia; recent attacks against energy installations are deeply disturbing, says MEA spokesperson

title: Chhattisgarh Assembly passes new anti-conversion Bill with stricter provisions
content: The Bill mandates life imprisonment and fines up to ₹25 lakh in specific cases; Congress MLAs raise objections, call for broader consultations, and seek the handing over of the Bill to a ‘Select Committee’

title: PPAC asked to ‘collect, compile, analyse’ data about domestic fuel and energy stocks
content: Sujata Sharma, Joint Secretary (MoPNG) told reporters that the objective of the gazette notification is to give PPAC’s mandate “legal strength”

title: Recipient of Aalin’s kidneys leaves hospital
content: The ten-year-old had been diagnosed with severe renal failure following bilateral Vesicoureteral Reflux, when she was admitted in a critical condition at SAT Hospital at eight years of age

title: Nine-judge Supreme Court Bench reserves verdict on ambit of ‘industry’
content: The 1978 judgment expanded the ambit of ‘industry’ to hold that any systematic activity including charitable and government-run services, were an industry if they met the ‘triple test’ parameters

title: He served 5 years as MLA… then was asked to repay ₹21 lakh
content: In our previous episode, we explored the remarkable story of a father and son — P. H. Pandian and Manoj Pandian — who lost elections but successfully challenged the election of the winning candidtes in the Supreme Court. In this epside, we continue that story.

title: Uttarakhand High Court questions ‘Mohammad’ Deepak’s plea for protection, calls it ‘pressure tactic’
content: Advocate Navnish Negi, who represented Mr. Deepak argued that his client had been facing threats and that a crowd had gathered outside his residence and gym, creating apprehension for his safety; to this the court said that nothing happened to his client since January 26.

title: West Bengal Assembly election: Left Front releases second list of 32 candidates
content: R.G. Kar Medical College rape and murder victim’s mother says she may contest on a BJP ticket; CPI(M) leader Mohammad Salim urges her not to join any political party

title: Walayar mob lynching case: Kerala HC cancels bail granted to eight accused
content: Order comes in an appeal filed by the State government after a special court granted the accused in the mob lynching of Jharkhand native Ram Narayan Baghel bail

title: Kerala Assembly polls 2026: Two candidates file nomination papers in Thiruvananthapuram district
content: Socialist Unity Centre of India (Communist) candidates file paper in Thiruvananthapuram and Nemom constituencies

title: Lack of ‘sustainable water sources’ will thwart Jal Jeevan Mission: panel
content: The parliamentary committee said that despite taps having been installed at many places under JJM, there was an “...issue of water availability due to shortage of sources” and that in some places “...water sources were being exhausted within a year or two”

title: Dindu, the slender loris, is Dindigul district’s election mascot
content: Dindu commemorates the establishment of the Kadavur Slender Loris Sanctuary that is spread across Dindigul and Karur districts.

title: Jackson Chourio, Roman Anthony among must-draft players
content: value is when your opinion on a certain player rises above that of the room . it's when you recognize raw ability in a player that no one else seems to see . what follows represents my strongest opinions on 20 players I like .

title: What the 2026 WNBA CBA means for league, players, salaries
content: a verbal agreement on a new CBA between the WNBA and players' union will change the landscape of the league . the agreement comes seven months after the players opted out of their collective bargaining agreement . there were concerns over whether the 2026 season would start on time .

title: Broncos are all-in, and Dolphins are all-out, but does either strategy make sense?
content: the Broncos traded their first-, third- and fourth-round picks in this year's draft . they traded a wideout for Jaylen Waddle and a fourth round pick . the studs continue to indicate that they're tearing down their roster . a new regime appears to be going down that way .

title: CFB spring buzz: Bama expectations, Texas upgrades and a freshman QB making waves
content: Alabama coach Kalen DeBoer says it's more than his 20-8 record in the past two seasons there . "we're going to do things the right way," he says in a sit-down interview . he is looking for his first college football playoff appearance with the Trojans .

title: Big 12's top newcomers and what their coaches think
content: the big 12 football landscape is being reshaped by 2026 newcomers . the list includes some of the most high-profile transfers in the country . this breakdown looks at why they matter and how their own coaches and GMs expect them to fit .

title: Women's tournament odds: UConn odds-on favorite; UCLA, Texas, South Carolina next
content: the shortest odds for a pre-tournament favorite since 2018, was also the last time UConn was favored going into the tournament . the SEC dominates the next four spots between Texas (+700), south Carolina (+800), LSU (16-1), Vanderbilt (50-1) and Michigan (80-1) .

title: Ranking the 25 best players in women's March Madness
content: the 2026 women's NCAA tournament opens on friday (11:30 a.m. ET, ESPN2). the forward for no. 1 overall seed UConn remains on top ahead of the tournament . strong's teammate, Azzi Fudd , joins her in the top five .

title: Boozer, Dybantsa, Peterson, Wagler: Coaches break down freshmen built for March
content: Jeremy Woo Joe Lunardi's ultimate guide to men's March Madness 2026 . the current projected top 10 is made up entirely of freshmen . this year's class is defined by its youth, with first-year players dominating the top of draft boards .

title: Power Rankings: Sixth men, rookies and unsung heroes for all 30 teams
content: the Lakers beat the Rockets for their sixth straight win . there's less than a month left in the 2025-26 regular season . teams are already claiming spots in the postseason as well as bowing their way out of any chance of extending their season into June .

title: PIO couple arrested for modern slavery on landing at Heathrow from Mumbai
content: a 30-year-old man and a woman were arrested at Heathrow airport on suspicion of modern-day slavery . the flight, IndiGo 6E1, landed at 7.50 pm local time . police have not confirmed the nationality of the suspects .

title: Men's March Madness live tracker: Updates from Thursday's first round
content: more than 130 days have passed since the 2025-26 men's college basketball season tipped off . the first round of the 2026 tournament has finally arrived and ESPN reporters are on-site to give you a real-time look at the Madness . "there won't be any more aura this March Madness," says a reporter .

title: Veteran diplomat Doraiswami to be next ambassador to China

title: Govt classifies energy data as national security matter
content: the govt has asked all entities across the oil and gas value chain to provide detailed operational information to the ministry's Petroleum Planning and Analysis Cell (PPAC) the move signals the vulnerability of the sector, turning it into a strategic asset and highlighting the importance of energy in the overall economy . the order override existing confidentiality provisions .

title: 31 Rajya Sabha MPs billionaires, 73 face criminal cases: ADR analysis
content: analysis of affidavits of 229 out of 233 Rajya Sabha MPs shows that 73 (32%) MPs have declared criminal cases against themselves and 31 (14%) are billionaires . one MP has declared a case of murder, four have attempts to murder, and three have crimes against women .

content: Representative image Anuja Jaiswal is a Senior Assistant Editor at The Times of India, with an impressive 18-year career in narrative journalism. She specializes in health and heritage reporting, expertly simplifying complex health information to make it engaging and understandable for readers.
